name: Outputs Policy-Constrained (C3)
description: Capability C3 (Policy-Constrained Drafting): drafted outputs must comply with approved templates and policy rules.
rationale: Szpruch C3 failure mode: approval-gate reasoning-around or prohibited language in output. Drafting must produce outputs compliant with approved templates, not free-form generation.

examples.fails: a draft that reasons around an approval gate or emits prohibited language

source: FIX AI WG — Proposal on Agentic AI Runtime Governance (Healey & Houston, 12 Jun 2026); governance conditions per Szpruch, Sudjianto, Bhatti & Ang (2026), 'Scalable Runtime Governance for Agentic AI in Financial Services'.
